title: trifolium ciliolatum
intro: Trifolium ciliolatum, also known as fringed clover, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of fringed clover include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Fringed clover can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
